identity.name: Smart Legal Dossier
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Swiss Design x Architectural Blueprints
Content is King: Data is the hero

body.usage: Body text, inputs, buttons, data tables.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.

grid_system.dashboard: Bento Grid Mode B (High Density). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-4.
grid_system.landing: Bento Grid Mode A (Asymmetric). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. Gap-8.

buttons.style: Sharp edges or very small radius (rounded-sm). High contrast.

cards.style: Flat, white background, subtle 1px border. No massive shadows.

status_badges.style: Pill shaped or rectangular with rounded-sm. Soft background, dark text.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise/grain on the main background to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React. Stroke width 1.5px for elegance.

landing_hero.alt: Minimalist modern lawyer desk with organized documents

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import link to public/index.html or src/index.css immediately.
THEME SETUP: Ensure tailwind.config.js uses the specific Slate (#0F172A) and Sky (#0369A1) colors defined.
NO GRADIENTS: Do not use bg-gradient-to-r or similar. Use solid blocks of color.
SHARP UI: Use 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' for a professional, Swiss-style look. Avoid 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-2xl'.
DENSITY: The dashboard should be information-dense but readable. Use 'text-sm' for data tables.
TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
DO NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Archivo'.
USE 'recharts' for any data visualization (timeline, stats).
universal_guidelines: Create depth through z-index and subtle borders, not heavy shadows.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical for layout containers.
Never use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or headers with content underneath.
